_instructions: To add a new export country, copy one object inside countries, give it a unique id, set name/region/status, set coordinates as map percentages from 0 to 100, then update products, summary, and details. No React code changes are needed.

pageHero.title: Global market access for sterile PFS partnerships.
pageHero.text: A dedicated international section for distributors, institutions, and pharma partners to review market focus, product categories, and begin a country-specific export enquiry.

section.title: International enquiries organized around markets, products, and documentation.
section.text: A focused export view for distributors and institutional buyers to review active markets, product categories, and begin a country-specific discussion with Memphis.
